titleStmt.title: SII 41.236: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 236. (A.R. No. 455 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Unfinished. Registers a public sale of land by the ūr of Poḷipākkam in Naḍuvumalai-Perumūrnāḍu to a merchant of Tirumayilāppil in Puliyūr-koṭṭam. Refers to a survey of the country (ulagaḷavu).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa taṉnirupatumalar maṉnava
r cūṭi ceṅkol vaḷarat ticaitoṟum cella veṅkali nikkiya meyṟan=taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalaḷavum
naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orucuṭar niḻaṟṟi virasimhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kop
para(āja)kecari paṉmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkirama coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭala
ttu naṭuvumalaip perumur nāṭṭup poḷipākkattu Ūrkkuc camainta kuvaḷaippākkakkiḻāṉ caṅkakkoḻuntu nampiyum pe
rumūr kiḻavar cuppaiyan viramalaiyun tiṇaiyānacuntaraṉ peṟṟāṉum pulikiḻān paramayan vikiramacoḻaṉu muḷḷiṭṭa I
vvaṉaivom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷūr melkaḻaṉiyil kīḻpārkkellai vaṇṇāṉ viṣappaṭṭi
melvarampukku meṟkun teṉpārkkellai kaṅkanerittūmpil kiḻakku nokkippoṉa meṭṭuvāykkālukku va
ṭakkum melpārkkellai Āṭkoṇṭān bhaṭṭaviruttikkut teṟkiṟkuṇṭiliṉ kīḻvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaliṅku niṉ
ṟum pāynta teṟkiṟkālukkut teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkum Uṭpaṭṭa taṭi palaviṉāl tiruvulakaḷaviṉpaṭi tūynilam Aṟunūṟum pat
tāntarattil viṟṟuttarak koḷviruḷiroveṉṟu kūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭu Etirmoḻi koṭuttor Immaṇṭalattup puliyūr koṭṭa
ttut tirumayilāppil viyāpāri Oṟṟikoṇṭānātittatevanāna tirttavāric cileṭṭi yen yāniṟō puṅkaḷūr melkaḻaniyil Iṉṉāṉ kel
llaikkuṭpaṭṭa taṭi palavināl tiruvulakaḷaviṟpaṭi tūy nilam pattāntarattiṟ kuḻi Aṟunūṟum Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār
koyiliṟ tiruppuṟakkuṭaiya
Digital edition of SII 41.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
